title: phacelia heterophylla var. frigida
intro: Phacelia heterophylla var. frigida is a plant species commonly known as the frigid phacelia, a variety of the larger phacelia heterophylla species. It is a flowering plant native to the western United States and is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The frigid phacelia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be smoked to relieve respiratory symptoms, offering relief from congestion and coughs.
